text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, as Mejiro Dober and I are
recapping the day...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait. I want to write that down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She reaches for something to write on and takes
out a manga magazine instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's this doing in here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Y-you saw nothing! Just keep talking!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's concentration seems to be
suffering. I should rethink her race schedule.
